criteria.description: A reader that starts before a concurrent write commits continues to see its originally-snapshotted version for the entire read, even after the pointer advances.
criteria.covered_by: TestSnapshotRead's paused-read/concurrent-CommitVersion interleaving: asserts Read() (resumed after v2 is committed) still returns v1's content.

criteria.description: Snapshot capture reflects the pointer value at request start (not lazily re-read later).
criteria.covered_by: TestSnapshotRead asserts Snapshot.Version() == 1 even after v2 has been committed.

criteria.description: Fresh snapshots taken AFTER a commit see the new version (snapshotting isn't a permanent global freeze).
criteria.covered_by: TestSnapshotRead's follow-up SnapshotRead call after the v2 commit, asserted to return v2 content.
go test ./engine/mvcc/... -race -count=1 (full package) — TestVersionWriter, TestCurrentVersionCAS unchanged and green.
